rule_text: Price Adjustment for pipes (other than DI) follows the formula P2 = P1 + (A2 - A1) × M / 1000, where A1/A2 are initial/current raw-material prices per MT and M is pipe weight per metre as per weight chart.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, generic pipe formula
verification_method: Check pipe PA bills use raw-material price ratio with weight-chart M factor; reject ad-hoc pipe pricing

rule_text: Price Adjustment for MS pipes uses the formula R2 = R1 + (M2 - M1) × Wm / 1000, where M1/M2 are initial/current raw-material prices per MT and Wm is weight of MS plates per metre of pipe.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, MS pipe formula
verification_method: Check MS pipe PA uses Wm factor and raw-material price ratio; reject formulas without MS-plate weight conversion

rule_text: GO Ms No 62/2021 applies prospectively only — it governs price-adjustment computations for agreements signed on or after 30-11-2021; ongoing works at the time of issue continue under their original agreement's PA clause.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Order Para 6 & 7
verification_method: For tender_date >= 30-11-2021: apply GO 62/2021 formulas; for tender_date < 30-11-2021: apply original agreement's PA clause
